projects.title: Aegis Finance - Chartered Accountant Firm Template
projects.challenge: Accounting and CA firms require a highly professional corporate web presence that showcases compliance services while offering clients useful, interactive tools to drive initial engagement and lead generation.
projects.solution: Engineered a premium, gold-and-navy themed landing page template containing interactive components: a live-calculating GST & Tax Calculator, and a simulated financial rates web scraper widget.
projects.outcome: Created a modular, reusable template that illustrates high-fidelity financial services branding and reduces onboarding friction for tax clients.
projects.feedback: Click 'Launch Live Demo' above to open the responsive template preview and test the interactive tax tools in a new tab.

projects.title: Scalable RESTful API & Database Integration
projects.challenge: A local vendor needed to consolidate multiple inventory data streams and vendor order formats into a single, unified database schema.
projects.solution: Engineered a scalable RESTful API with automated database synchronization schedules to ensure inventory updates are processed with sub-second latencies.
projects.outcome: Successfully unified order entries, reducing order synchronization delays to near-zero.
projects.feedback: Our inventory sync issues have disappeared completely. The API integration runs flawlessly.

projects.title: IIT M.Tech vs. SDE Career Pathway Advisory
projects.challenge: A CSE final year student holding an industry SDE PPO faced a critical decision after receiving an M.Tech offer from IIT Dharwad. They required an objective analysis of IIT's academic curriculum, research policies (such as internship restrictions), and MNC hiring trends compared to practical industry experience.
projects.solution: Conducted a detailed strategic evaluation of the academic structure, faculty advisors' research alignment, and placement analytics (MTech vs. BTech recruitment ratios). Highlighted institutional policy constraints regarding off-campus internships and recommended focusing on active industry SDE growth to build practical software engineering expertise.
projects.outcome: The client gained clear, data-driven decision criteria and decided to accept the industry SDE role to maximize hands-on software development experience.

client.name: Aradhya Chakrabarti
client.title: HighRadius SDE Intern & KIIT CSE Student

projects.feedback: Thanks for the answer! The details regarding M.Tech project guidelines and internship restrictions helped clarify the situation completely.

projects.title: Evertz Campus Placement Strategy Advisory
projects.challenge: A final-year engineering student needed high-impact preparation strategies and tips for an upcoming SDE campus placement drive by Evertz.
projects.solution: Provided a structured preparation roadmap mapping specific DSA levels (focusing on Medium-level problems) and explaining the combined weight of the technical placement exam and interview rounds in final role assignments.
projects.outcome: The candidate entered the recruitment drive with a targeted study plan and clear understanding of the evaluation criteria.

client.name: Shivam Choudhary
client.title: KIIT SAP FICO & KIIT CSE Student

projects.feedback: Okk bhaiya. Thnxx! The targeted DSA focus helped me optimize my preparation timeline.

projects.title: Competitive Hackathon Mentorship & Prototype Engineering
projects.challenge: An aspiring student engineer needed guidance to design, develop, and execute functional prototypes for multiple competitive hackathons.
projects.solution: Mentored the student on architectural selection, UI workflows, and collaborative version control. Co-participated in hackathon sprints to provide direct pair-programming guidance and code review during critical prototype phases.
projects.outcome: Successfully built and deployed functional prototypes during multiple hackathons, accelerating the student's engineering and design capabilities.

client.name: Akshara Khatri
client.title: GL Bajaj Institute of Technology and Management CSE Student & Hackathon Partner

projects.feedback: The hands-on guidance on architecture and git workflows helped us deliver working code on time and won us valuable engineering confidence.
